texto: SHUT UP," Carot Top say, the cocane now taking effect. "This isnt Poetry 101. People want to laugh. Your suposed to be a 'King' of Prop Comedy. But youve been acting more like a jester of prop comedy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Seinfeld 2000: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “SHUT UP," Carot Top say, the cocane now taking effect. "This isnt Poetry 101. People want to laug…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, comedy, funny pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de funny.
